signature.cause: Hidden acceptance tests fail; repro test is insufficient
signature.behavior: Agent generates patch that passes reproduction test but fails hidden test suite, indicating the reproduction test does not fully capture the required behavior
signature.mechanism: Repro test written by write_test role has incomplete coverage or misses critical edge cases; fix addresses only what repro test validates

clusters.symptom: Patch passes local repro (repro_pass=True, regression=1.0) but hidden tests fail (resolved=0)

signature.cause: Fix introduces unintended side effects in test infrastructure
signature.behavior: Agent's fix changes AST representation (constants vs Name nodes), breaking pytest's test discovery for parametrized tests with the affected keywords
signature.mechanism: AST node type change (ast.NameConstant vs ast.Name) propagates to test parameter stringification, rendering test IDs unparseable (e.g., test names split across lines)

clusters.symptom: Repro passes (repro_pass=True) but regression tests cannot be found/parsed (regression=0.0, REG_RC=4)

signature.cause: Agent unable to generate valid candidate patch
signature.behavior: Draft role fails to produce any fixable code suggestions; both candidate patches marked invalid with score=0.0
signature.mechanism: Problem may exceed agent reasoning capability, require domain knowledge unavailable in context, or fall outside patterns the agent has seen
